8:I[4902,["972","static/chunks/972-4a2221276744b501.js","712","static/chunks/712-2dde1a71ebc19675.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-78b21f889c52d68c.js"],"AuthProvider"]
9:I[4114,["972","static/chunks/972-4a2221276744b501.js","712","static/chunks/712-2dde1a71ebc19675.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-78b21f889c52d68c.js"],"Navbar"]
3:T9d0,<br/>## Client Profile<br/><br/>**Elite Aesthetic Center** is a premier Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice with:<br/>- 500+ 5-star reviews on Google and RealSelf<br/>- Board-certified surgeons with Ivy League credentials  <br/>- State-of-the-art surgical facility<br/>- 15+ years of established reputation<br/><br/>## The Challenge<br/><br/>Despite their stellar reputation, they were completely invisible in AI search results. When potential patients asked ChatGPT, Claude, or Perplexity about breast augmentation or facelifts in Beverly Hills, competitors were consistently recommended—not them.<br/><br/>**Estimated monthly loss: $180,000** in potential procedure bookings<br/><br/>## Our Solution: Aesthetic Intent Interceptor Protocol<br/><br/>### Phase 1: Foundation (Days 1-30)<br/>- Implemented comprehensive Medical Schema markup<br/>- Created structured data for all 47 procedures<br/>- Built AI-readable service catalog with llms.txt<br/>- Published 12 deep-dive articles targeting AI-cited queries<br/><br/>### Phase 2: Authority Seeding (Days 31-60)<br/>- Established citations in Healthline, WebMD, and Medical News Today<br/>- Secured mentions in 8 Reddit communities<br/>- Created 15 RealSelf educational answers<br/><br/>### Phase 3: Intent Capture (Days 61-90)<br/>- Optimized for "Beverly Hills + [procedure]" entity relationships<br/>- Built neighborhood-specific content clusters<br/>- Implemented location-aware semantic markup<br/><br/>## The Results<br/><br/>| Metric | Before | After | Change |<br/>|--------|--------|-------|--------|<br/>| AI Visibility Score | 28/100 | 82/100 | +193% |<br/>| Monthly AI Referrals | 0 | 47 | NEW |<br/>| Consultation Bookings | Baseline | +156% | vs. Q3 |<br/>| Revenue from AI Source | $0 | $1.2M | 6-month |<br/><br/>### Client Testimonial<br/><br/>"The transformation was unbelievable. Within 60 days, our front desk started reporting that patients were finding us through ChatGPT. By day 90, we had to hire an additional patient coordinator just to handle the influx."<br/><br/>— Dr. Sarah Chen, Medical Director<br/><br/>## Key Success Factors<br/><br/>1. **Medical-Specific GEO Expertise**: Understanding how AI engines evaluate medical authority<br/>2. **Semantic Content Architecture**: Building content AI engines can parse as authoritative answers<br/>3. **Rapid Authority Building**: Aggressive placement in high-weight medical knowledge sources<br/>4. **Continuous Optimization**: Weekly monitoring of AI response patterns<br/>    5:["id","beverly-hills","d"]
